name: Skill_Class_Learn
condition: source == 'class_change' and ([field[1] for field in DB.classes.get(unit.klass).fields if field[0] == 'ClassSkill'][0] not in unit.get_field('LearnedSkills'))
_source: game_var;NewSkillToSwapIn;[field[1] for field in DB.classes.get(unit.klass).fields if field[0] == 'ClassSkill'][0]
# Add skill to unit's list of learned skills
# Add skill to list of equipped skills if less than 5 skills, otherwise, prompt to swap out a skill.
